emails.subject: FW: Buffalo Power Company LLC - Gas Turbine Power Plant Project
emails.subject_base: Buffalo Power Company LLC - Gas Turbine Power Plant Project
emails.body: Calger asked my to be your Sr. Commercial guy on this potential tranaction....It would be helpful if you would spend a little time with me to better explain the business proposition that you see we would promote. I will be available for a meeting in Denver. In fact, I am planning on being their the weekend of Nov. 3. Maybe we can schedule something around that date. Give me a call Jake Thomas 503-464-3803
